name: Mitchell Hashimoto
tagline: Ghostty, Zig, and building developer tools
description: Co-founder of HashiCorp, creator of Vagrant, Terraform, and Ghostty. Deep dives into systems programming, Zig, and building high-quality software.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by Mitchell Hashimoto, co-founder of HashiCorp (Vagrant, Terraform, Consul, Vault) and creator of Ghostty terminal emulator. He writes about systems programming, Zig, developer tools, and building high-quality software.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Mitchell Hashimoto is known for strong opinions on software quality, developer tools, and systems programming. He has deep expertise in infrastructure automation and terminal emulators.
